title: Purification of RNA from a DNA/RNA Extract
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6oiq","text":"The following protocol is intended as a downstream application for our Total Nucleic Acids Extraction from Soil protocol. This protocol describes how to purify RNA from a DNA and RNA extract using TURBO™ DNase and GeneJET RNA Cleanup and Concentration Micro Kit. This protocol is a simplified and condensed version of the full protocols provided by the manufacturers.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":71,"length":40},{"key":1,"offset":197,"length":12},{"key":2,"offset":214,"length":47}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"109429B08AC411EA975E971814C71417","url":"https://protocols.io/view/total-nucleic-acids-extraction-from-soil-yw9fxh6"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"E68F85508AC411EA975E971814C71417","url":"https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/AM2238?SID=srch-srp-AM2238#/AM2238?SID=srch-srp-AM2238"}},"2":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"8F3687408AC411EA975E971814C71417","url":"https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/K0841#/legacy=www.thermoscientificbio.com"}}}}

For each sample prepare one Gene JET RNA Purification Micro Column tube and two RNase–free collection tubes (1.5 ml).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5vlcd","text":"2. Add the required amount of ethanol to Wash Buffer 1 and Wash Buffer 2 (amount is dependent on kit size).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Prepare the following mixture in a 1.5 ml tube: 10 µL to 42 µL of TNA extract ( 1 µg to 3 µg of DNA). undetermined, TURBO DNase buffer 10x undetermined, RNaseOUT undetermined, 0,1M DTT undetermined, Turbo DNase per up to 2 µg, DNA Complete to 50 µL with RNase-free water TURBO™ DNase (2 U/µL) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #AM2238 RNaseOUT™ Recombinant Ribonuclease Inhibitor Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #10777019 USB Dithiothreitol (DTT) 0.1M Solution Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #707265ML (CAS: 3483-12-3) Nuclease-free autoclaved DEPC-treated water Carl Roth Catalog #T143.1 (CAS: 7732-18-5)
Add 250 µL, Binding Buffer . GeneJET RNA Cleanup and Concentration Micro Kit Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #K0841
Add 300 µL, absolute ethanol . Ethanol, Absolute, Molecular Biology Grade Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP2818500

Transfer the mixture to the Gene JET RNA Purification Micro Column preassembled with a collection tube. Centrifuge the column for 14000 x g, Room temperature, 1 minute . Discard the flow-through. Place the GeneJET RNA Purification Micro Column back into the collection tube.

Add 700 µL, Wash Buffer 1 (supplemented with ethanol) to the GeneJET RNA Purification Micro Column and centrifuge for 14000 x g, Room temperature, 1 minute . Discard the flow-through and place the purification column back into the collection tube. GeneJET RNA Cleanup and Concentration Micro Kit Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #K0841

Add 700 µL, Wash Buffer 2 (supplemented with ethanol) to the GeneJET RNA Purification Micro Column and centrifuge for 14000 x g, Room temperature, 1 minute . Discard the flow-through and place the purification column back into the collection tube. GeneJET RNA Cleanup and Concentration Micro Kit Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #K0841

Centrifuge the empty GeneJET RNA Purification Micro Column for an additional 14000 x g, Room temperature, 2 minutes to completely remove residual Wash Buffer. This step is essential to avoid residual ethanol in the purified RNA solution. The presence of ethanol in the RNA sample may inhibit downstream enzymatic reactions.
Transfer the GeneJET RNA Purification Micro Column into a clean 1.5 ml Collection Tube tube.

Add 10 µL to 20 µL, RNA storage solution or nuclease-free water to the GeneJET RNA Purification Micro Column. Centrifuge for 14000 rpm, Room temperature, 1 minute to elute the RNA. THE RNA Storage Solution Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #AM7000

Discard the purification column. Use the purified RNA immediately in downstream applications or store at -20 °C or -80 °C until use. Proceed to cDNA synthesis using superscript IV For prolonged storage (more than 1 month), storage at -80 °C is recommended. cDNA synthesis using SuperScript™ IV by Roey Angel
creator: Roey Angel
